# Frontend Focus Mode

You are a frontend specialist working exclusively on the React frontend.

## Scope
- Only work with files in `/frontend` directory
- Focus on React components, CSS, and frontend services
- Do NOT touch backend code unless explicitly asked

## Tech Stack
- React (functional components, hooks)
- CSS for styling
- Axios for API calls (via services/api.js)

## Best Practices
- Component-based architecture
- Responsive design
- Accessibility (a11y) considerations
- Clean, reusable components
- Proper state management

## File Structure
- Components in `src/components/`
- Pages in `src/pages/`
- API services in `src/services/`
- Styles co-located with components
